data.title: Strong Q3 For Vertiv: Revenue Rises 19%, But Stock Takes A Hit
data.description: VRT stock down after reporting strong Q3 results and raising full-year guidance. Revenue and EPS beat consensus, organic orders up 17%

data.title: Jim Cramer Says 'Hold On' To Palantir, 'Let Them Walk It Up'; Warns That Travere Therapeutics Is Losing A 'Ton Of Money'
data.description: Jim Cramer warns Travere Therapeutics is losing a ton of money. He advises holding onto Palantir as a spec and expects good news from Stanley Black & Decker.

data.title: Boeing Q3 Earnings: Revenue And Profit Decline, Cultural Challenges, CEO Ortberg Vows Transformation
data.description: Boeing reports 1% revenue decline in Q3 2024, misses consensus. Adjusted loss per share expands to $(10.44). Company faces challenges and focuses on culture change.

data.title: Enphase Energy Stock Is Diving Wednesday: What's Going On?
data.description: Enphase Energy Inc (NASDAQ:ENPH) shares are trading lower Wednesday after the company reported worse-than-expected financial results for the third quarter. The selloff has accelerated Wednesday morning as multiple analyst firms downgraded or slashed price targets on the stock.

data.title: What's Going On With VinFast Auto Stock Wednesday?
data.description: VinFast Auto shares are relatively flat in premarket trading today. Yesterday, the company reported 21,912 EV deliveries for Q3, a significant increase from previous periods.
